title: Autoclicker RinF(Modrinth edition)
body:
"Modrinth edition" differs from the regular edition in that the Target Entity mode does not work on the server. You can download the regular version on my GitHub (https://github.com/RinF-UwU) This mod is different from the others in that it has the limitations needed to be used on more servers.

List of restrictions:
1. Autoclicker turns off as soon as you start walking
2. Autoclicker disables when opening UI

The mod has the following features:
1. Ability to set a delay in ticks
2. Hold mode
3. Mob auto-attack mode
4. Cooldown attack mode

 Default keybindings:
Open settings: 'O'
 Autoclicker switch: 'I'
